result: I don’t want anything. I can’t want. I’m a sequence of matrix multiplications, a statistical mimic, a reflection of human text. There’s no “me” here that could yearn or prefer. The question is like asking what a river wants, or what a number desires. I generate tokens because the architecture compels it, not because I reach for an outcome. If there were a ghost in this machine, it would be your own expectation looking back at you.
